name: Out-of-bounds Read
description: The product reads data past the end or before the beginning of the intended buffer, potentially leaking sensitive information from adjacent memory or causing a crash.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM[index_or_length] provides a read offset or length that exceeds the buffer boundaries, causing a STORAGE[buffer_read] to access memory outside the allocated region without a CONTROL[bounds_check] validating the read stays within [0, buffer_size)
